scripts.test: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:html && npm run check:smoke
scripts.check:syntax: node --check app.js && node --check today-prompt.js && node --check attribution.js && node --check landing.js && node --check root-redirect.js && node --check miniapp-boot.js
scripts.check:smoke: node tests/landing-smoke.mjs && node tests/today-prompt.mjs && node tests/miniapp-smoke.mjs
